course_name: Leadership skills for First Time Managers

sections.content: Individual performers are promoted as managers based on their stellar performance, but it requires completely different skills-sets to manage people and get the work done. This program is developed for managers who have recently moved to a new role, from an individual contributor to manager. It is predominant, that the newly promoted managers should have necessary tools and skills right from beginning, to become an effective leader.

sections.section: Leadership skills for First Time Managers
content: Individual performers are promoted as managers based on their stellar performance, but it requires completely different skills-sets to manage people and get the work done.

This program is developed for managers who have recently moved to a new role, from an individual contributor to manager. It is predominant, that the newly promoted managers should have necessary tools and skills right from beginning, to become an effective leader.

First time managers is a two days interactive program wherein new skillsets to lead managerial role is experientially integrated. Also, approaches to manage stress & cohesively build a strong team is downloaded which helps to lead effectively to achieve results
Understand roles and responsibilities of a team leader
Learn how to provide clear direction to teams
Learn to provide specific positive and constructive feedback to team members
Learn how to delegating task to team members
Understand team dynamics & build a strong team that drive results
Methods to manage managerial stress
